item.title: JonasLeng: The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó Jonjo Leng (Barsteward) @JonasLeng · 24min Then you get caught on the same side of the
item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó Jonjo Leng (Barsteward) @JonasLeng · 24min Then you get caught on the same side of the street as someone who doesn’t fancy dog racing and every fuckers granny is taking pot shots Been collectively called allsorts for giving a shit about this sport Half of us can’t get a bet on anyway Might as well have been watching HBO Cita The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 5h Four years we've been banging on about 'affordability'. Why has everyone suddenly joined the party? Scared at losing your livelihood? A lot of full time bettors already have, you didn't care then, we know why you do now, poop/fan etc. Wait till they wheel out open banking next! 1 3 302

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 42min There has never been a legal challenge because they have never wanted on
item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 42min There has never been a legal challenge because they have never wanted one. Cita James Noyes @jranoyes · 45min En respuesta a @geoffbanksbet I admit I’m surprised that there hasn’t already been a legal challenge by an operator. I guess the question is whether there is a strong enough basis for such a challenge to be made. 1 3 442

item.title: giorgiking10: Daniel Barber reposteó Giorgi Kinkladze @giorgiking10 · 4h En respuesta a @petercrouch Appreciated 20 76 1 mil 19 mil
item.description: Daniel Barber reposteó Giorgi Kinkladze @giorgiking10 · 4h En respuesta a @petercrouch Appreciated 20 76 1 mil 19 mil

The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó Jess Keys - The Producer @TheProducer24 · 2h En respuesta a @AntepostValue y @BarstewardsThe You clearly haven’t read this and the shit myself and Lee have been put through this last year for trying to help the sport out. Cita The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 21 feb. Artículo The Unlikely Alliance - A story of betrayal and the reemergence of a stalker. After 14 months of holding my tongue, while many people whom I used to regard as friends put out half-truths and lies. I have decided to release the full story of how I came to work with Matt Zarb... 1 10 1 mil

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 2h That's why on Thursday I am meeting in person in York someone suffering wit
item.description:
The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 2h That's why on Thursday I am meeting in person in York someone suffering with mental health issues. Don't chuck that at me, you don't know me and anything I do for people suffering with mental health. Cita Liam Firkin @AntepostValue · 2h En respuesta a @BarstewardsThe I know. Imagine coming from outside the sport with no leg up, trying hard at something, taking a huge pay cut from your day-to-day job to pursue a career in something you enjoy while making other people money
I really am the devil
The mental health advocate who spews hate 1 1 7 2 mil

The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó Jess Keys - The Producer @TheProducer24 · 2h En respuesta a @AntepostValue y @BarstewardsThe What have you done for the sport in the last few years to fight against these checks? Lee has though outside the box, worked for free and got dogs abuse for talking to people who are now helping sort this mess out. Whilst those that work in the industry just ignored the issue. 1 10 1 mil

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 2h Unhinged Cita Liam Firkin @AntepostValue · 2h En respuesta a @BarstewardsTh
item.description:
The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 2h Unhinged Cita Liam Firkin @AntepostValue · 2h En respuesta a @BarstewardsThe I know. Imagine coming from outside the sport with no leg up, trying hard at something, taking a huge pay cut from your day-to-day job to pursue a career in something you enjoy while making other people money
I really am the devil
The mental health advocate who spews hate 5 1 mil
